Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Akura Mercy]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Skysworn ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 14''' — Akura Mercy is a slender girl with a long black ponytail and vivid purple eyes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 15''' — Akura Mercy is a Lowgold trainee.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 18''' — Akura Mercy identified herself by name.}}

== Ghostwater ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 2''' — Akura Mercy is a child of the Akura clan with wide purple eyes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 18''' — Akura Mercy is on a Skysworn squad with Lindon.}}

== Underlord ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 6''' — Akura Mercy is a young lady whom Cassias Arelius addresses.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 16''' — Akura Mercy is a member of the Akura family.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 19''' — Akura Mercy's arrows have a technique embedded in them that burns soul and flesh.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 19''' — Akura Mercy intentionally lunged into Daji's swords.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 20''' — Akura Mercy is the daughter of Akura Malice.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 20''' — Akura Mercy is considered a genius even by Akura clan standards.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 20''' — Akura Mercy's ability is so strong she must have it suppressed to avoid burdening her spirit.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 20''' — At Copper, Iron, and Jade, Akura Mercy outclasses her peers in madra control, technique proficiency, and shadow aura compatibility.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 20''' — Akura Mercy sets records in combat with bows, staffs, flying swords, and puppet constructs.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 20''' — Akura Malice declared Akura Mercy her heir.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 20''' — Akura Mercy passed through Gold with ease.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 20''' — Akura Mercy practices the sacred arts for the benefit of others.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 20''' — Akura Mercy discovered her Underlord revelation.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 20''' — As part of her departure, Akura Mercy's body and physical skill were sealed.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 20''' — Akura Mercy was allowed to keep her personal belongings, her bow, and her Book.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 20''' — Akura Mercy and Akura Malice made a bet regarding Mercy's survival on her own.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 20''' — Akura Mercy gave up her bet to save Lindon and Yerin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 20''' — Akura Mercy was holding her bow and wearing broken green armor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 20''' — Akura Mercy is a Truegold.}}

== Uncrowned ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 2''' — Akura Mercy assured Lindon he would be safe in the dungeon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 10''' — Akura Mercy is the favored daughter of the Monarch Akura Malice.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 16''' — Akura Mercy is instructed to watch the battle from inside a booth.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 18''' — Akura Mercy is of the Akura clan and a chosen of Akura Malice.}}

== Bloodline ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 10''' — Akura Mercy is the daughter of a ruler.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 10''' — Akura Mercy's mother is the guardian of the lands around Sacred Valley.}}

== Reaper ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 10''' — Akura Mercy is present.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 21''' — Akura Mercy is a character who was weak after her time in the labyrinth.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 21''' — Akura Mercy's eyes shimmer slightly before she calls her armor.}}

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 28''' — Emriss wants to speak to Akura Mercy about what it means to bring joy.}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 9''' — Akura Mercy was the target of an assassination attempt involving Seishen Daji.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
